items.title: What does Celtic's latest loss mean for Scottish Premiership title race?
items.description: Perhaps Celtic losing to Dundee United shouldn't have been that surprising.  After all, there's only been one weekend in this astonishing Scottish Premiership season in which the top three have all won.

items.title: Martin O’Neill calls for Celtic to ‘reinvent character’ after costly defeat

items.title: Martin O'Neill on Celtic fans targeting board for abuse after Dundee United loss

items.title: How a Celtic legend helped Scottish FA Cup winner come back from broken leg
items.description: A SCOTTISH FA Cup winner might have never lifted the coveted trophy if it hadn't been for a Celtic legend.
